channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: US-Iran Ceasefire Live Updates: Iran, China Envoys Meet As Trump Pauses US Effort In Hormuz
item.description: US-Iran Ceasefire Live Updates: The attacks shattered a period of relative calm in the Middle East since the ceasefire took effect on April 8.
item.content:encoded: US-Iran Ceasefire Live Updates: The attacks shattered a period of relative calm in the Middle East since the ceasefire took effect on April 8.

item.title: Hantavirus Outbreak Kills 3 In Atlantic Cruise Ship : What We Know So Far

media:content.media:description: There are no vaccines or specific medications for hantavirus.

item.description: Hantavirus is a rare disease that usually spreads from infected rodents, typically through urine, droppings and saliva.
item.content:encoded: Hantavirus is a rare disease that usually spreads from infected rodents, typically through urine, droppings and saliva.

item.title: SpaceX IPO To Give Elon Musk More Power In Company, Curb Shareholder Rights

media:content.media:description: Elon Musk retains majority voting power and sole authority to remove himself as CEO and chairman.

item.description: SpaceX's IPO registration statement sharply limits investor's ability to challenge management, sue in court and force votes on governance issues.
item.content:encoded: SpaceX's IPO registration statement sharply limits investor's ability to challenge management, sue in court and force votes on governance issues.

item.title: As Trump-Xi Summit Draws Near, China Steps Up Iran War Diplomacy

media:content.media:description: Trump and Xi are set to meet in Beijing next week, with the conflict likely to be discussed (File Photo).

item.description: China is not an official mediator in the US-Iran war, but it has played an important role in efforts to de-escalate the conflict.
item.content:encoded: China is not an official mediator in the US-Iran war, but it has played an important role in efforts to de-escalate the conflict.

item.title: US School Director Sentenced To Jail For Leading A Secret Student Fight Club

media:content.media:description: Mary Tracy Morrison sentenced for permitting child abuse and contributing to delinquency.

item.description: Mary Tracy Morrison, 50, was called the "ringleader" of a "makeshift fight club" by the prosecutors.
item.content:encoded: Mary Tracy Morrison, 50, was called the "ringleader" of a "makeshift fight club" by the prosecutors.

item.title: 'If They Don't Agree, Bombing Starts': Trump Threatens Iran Amid Deal Buzz

media:content.media:description: The FBI has been carrying out a detailed examination of Allen's social media activity.

item.description: US officials have so far said little about Allen's alleged motivation, pointing only to an email Allen sent to relatives on the night of the attack.
item.content:encoded: US officials have so far said little about Allen's alleged motivation, pointing only to an email Allen sent to relatives on the night of the attack.

item.title: US Brothers Pose As Middle Eastern Royals To Pull Off $21 Million Fraud, Spend It On Private Jets And Cars

media:content.media:description: The brothers were convicted of multiple counts of wire fraud, money laundering.

item.description: The brothers, originally from the Cleveland area, claimed to be UAE royalty, with Zubair falsely asserting he was married to a UAE princess.
item.content:encoded: The brothers, originally from the Cleveland area, claimed to be UAE royalty, with Zubair falsely asserting he was married to a UAE princess.

item.title: Iran War Anger May Have Triggered Trump Dinner Shooting Suspect: Report

media:content.media:description: The evaluation noted that Allen had "multiple social and political grievances".

item.description: According to a report by Reuters, a preliminary assessment by the US Department of Homeland Security's Office of Intelligence and Analysis last month concluded that the Iran war "may have contributed to his decision to conduct the attack".
item.content:encoded: According to a report by Reuters, a preliminary assessment by the US Department of Homeland Security's Office of Intelligence and Analysis last month concluded that the Iran war "may have contributed to his decision to conduct the attack".

item.title: Tarique Rahman's BNP Congratulates BJP On Bengal Win With A 'Teesta' Request

media:content.media:description: India and Bangladesh share 54 common rivers, but only two treaties have been signed

item.description: The BNP leader claimed Mamata Banerjee's government was the "impediment" to the Teesta Barrage agreement and hoped that with Suvendu Adhikari at the helm in West Bengal, the BJP administration would relook at the treaty.
item.content:encoded: The BNP leader claimed Mamata Banerjee's government was the "impediment" to the Teesta Barrage agreement and hoped that with Suvendu Adhikari at the helm in West Bengal, the BJP administration would relook at the treaty.

item.title: Hantavirus Outbreak: Does Quarantine On A Cruise Ship Minimise Disease Spread?

media:content.media:description: Quarantine on a cruise ship can help reduce hantavirus spread

item.description: Hantavirus is a rare virus carried by rodents, spread to humans through exposure to their urine, droppings, or saliva. Confirmed cases aboard an Atlantic cruise ship has raised alarm.
item.content:encoded: Hantavirus is a rare virus carried by rodents, spread to humans through exposure to their urine, droppings, or saliva. Confirmed cases aboard an Atlantic cruise ship has raised alarm.

item.title: Pakistan Navy Helps Stranded Indian Ship In Arabian Sea After SOS Message

media:content.media:description: The navy was assisted by Pakistan Maritime Security Agency in the rescue ops (Representative Image)

item.description: The Pakistan Navy launched a rescue and support operation for the crew-- six Indians and one Indonesian-- after the Maritime Rescue and Coordination Centre in Mumbai contacted authorities in Islamabad.
item.content:encoded: The Pakistan Navy launched a rescue and support operation for the crew-- six Indians and one Indonesian-- after the Maritime Rescue and Coordination Centre in Mumbai contacted authorities in Islamabad.

item.title: US, Iran Closing In On One-page Memo To End War: Report

media:content.media:description: Among other provisions, the deal would involve Iran committing to a moratorium on nuclear enrichment.

item.description: The White House believes it is getting close to an agreement with Iran on a onepage memorandum of understanding to end the war and set a framework for more detailed nuclear
item.content:encoded: The White House believes it is getting close to an agreement with Iran on a onepage memorandum of understanding to end the war and set a framework for more detailed nuclear

item.title: "Killing Like We Haven't Killed Since 1967": Israeli Army Chief's Big Remark

media:content.media:description: The year 1967 refers to the Six-Day War between Israel and its neighbouring countries. (Representational)

item.description: The year 1967 refers to the Six-Day War, a major conflict between Israel and its neighbouring countries that led to the displacement of over 3 lakh Palestinians.
item.content:encoded: The year 1967 refers to the Six-Day War, a major conflict between Israel and its neighbouring countries that led to the displacement of over 3 lakh Palestinians.

item.title: "Higher Than Covid And January 6": Seth Meyers Mocks Trump's Poll Numbers

media:content.media:description: Seth Meyers, in his latest monologue, mocked Trump's plunging approval ratings

item.description: During his latest monologue, Meyers stated that the president’s disapproval numbers were now “higher than Covid and January 6.”
item.content:encoded: During his latest monologue, Meyers stated that the president’s disapproval numbers were now “higher than Covid and January 6.”

item.title: Rare Human-To-Human Spread Confirmed In Hantavirus Outbreak On Cruise Ship

media:content.media:description: The hantavirus outbreak on MV Hondius has left 3 dead so far

item.description: A WHO update suggests rare human-to-human hantavirus transmission may have occurred on the cruise ship where an outbreak has left 3 dead so far. Risks to public health, however, still remains low.
item.content:encoded: A WHO update suggests rare human-to-human hantavirus transmission may have occurred on the cruise ship where an outbreak has left 3 dead so far. Risks to public health, however, still remains low.

item.title: Germany Surpasses US To Become Leading Ammunition Producer: Report
item.description: Germany's defence company Rheinmetall says it has massively increased its military production in recent years.
item.content:encoded: Germany's defence company Rheinmetall says it has massively increased its military production in recent years.

item.title: "Pak Army Fought For Hafiz Saeed, Masood Azhar": Big Revelation On 2025 War

media:content.media:description: The PNP leader also admitted to meeting LeT founder Hafiz Saeed.

item.description: This admission tears into Islamabad's "non-state actor" facade and how Islamabad has been providing institutional support to terror networks under the guise of "freedom fighting".
item.content:encoded: This admission tears into Islamabad's "non-state actor" facade and how Islamabad has been providing institutional support to terror networks under the guise of "freedom fighting".

item.title: Elon Musk Wanted $80 Billion To Colonise Mars: OpenAI President At Trial

media:content.media:description: Elon Musk alleges that he was conned by OpenAI chief Sam Altman.

item.description: The trial, in its second week in a California courtroom, could determine the future of OpenAI, which is know for its launch of ChatGPT chatbot.
item.content:encoded: The trial, in its second week in a California courtroom, could determine the future of OpenAI, which is know for its launch of ChatGPT chatbot.

item.title: Gasoline Costs 50% More In The US Than It Did Before Iran War

media:content.media:description: Less oil on the market means higher prices for oil and gasoline.

item.description: The price of crude oil, which is the main ingredient in gasoline, has been climbing for most of the past two months.
item.content:encoded: The price of crude oil, which is the main ingredient in gasoline, has been climbing for most of the past two months.

item.title: Inside Cruise Ship At The Center Of A Deadly Hantavirus Outbreak

media:content.media:description: WHO investigates possible human transmission and suspects initial infection pre-boarding.

item.description: The MV Hondius, a Dutch ship on a weekslong polar cruise, departed April 1 from Argentina for Antarctica and several islands in the South Atlantic.
item.content:encoded: The MV Hondius, a Dutch ship on a weekslong polar cruise, departed April 1 from Argentina for Antarctica and several islands in the South Atlantic.
